testcase.name: getReportStatus returns DTO when report exists
getReportStatus throws EntityNotFoundException when not found
getReportForDownload returns report when status is DONE
getSummary: null metric values are handled gracefully (not NPE)
triggerReportGeneration saves report and invokes async generator
getSummary(QUARTERLY) sums all four metric types
getReportForDownload throws when report status is GENERATING
